title: Add License Headers Executor Schema
description: Add license headers to compiled files

targetDirectory.description: Directory containing files to add headers to

packageJsonPath.description: Path to package.json for version info

separatorBetweenBannerAndContent.description: Separator between license banner and the module content

includePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to include (relative to targetDirectory)

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude

licenseTemplateFile.description: Path to custom license template file (uses default MIT template if not specified)

eulaUrl.description: EULA URL for template variable <%= eula %>

prependAfterLicense.description: Content to prepend after license header (e.g., '"use strict";\n\n')

version.description: Version to use in template (defaults to pkg.version)

commentType.description: Comment type marker placed after /* in the license banner opening

mode.description: Selects which bundled license template to use. 'eula' references the DevExtreme EULA URL; 'mit' references MIT terms and a GitHub repo URL. When licenseTemplateFile is provided, mode is ignored.
